name: HQ chrome refresh + Home
spec_consumed: docs/CLUBHOUSE_SPEC-HQ.md (750 lines — palette, typography, layout, motion, masthead)
docs/CLUBHOUSE_SPEC-HQ-3a-Home.md (324 lines — HQ Home 4 states: default, quiet, first-time, crisis-banner)

implementation.primary_module: src/core/page-shell.js (295 lines, v8.11.4 Page Shell architecture)
implementation.consumer_module: src/pages/home.js (lines 199+ — _renderHQHome consumes PB.pageShell.render with slot composition)
implementation.tokens_consumed: src/styles/base.css (90 --cb-* tokens + 6 W2.S0 additions from W1.S1 baseline)
implementation.fallback: src/pages/home.js line 89-98 — try/catch wraps _renderHQHome, falls back to _renderMobileHome on error; pageEl.dataset.renderPath stamped 'hq-fallback' for debug

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Page Shell renders correctly at all bands (A/B/C/D)
acceptance_criteria.evidence: PB.pageShell.render dispatches by band; bands=['A','B','C','D'] in home.js

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Masthead consolidates correctly (avatar, league chip with chevron when N>1, notifications, messages, calendar)
acceptance_criteria.evidence: scope slot in home.js renders league chip with multi-league chevron logic; chip routes to leagues page

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Live banner toggle covers 0/1/3 simultaneous live rounds
acceptance_criteria.evidence: _renderHQLocationBanner + LIVE banner state in _renderHQHomeBanded; live-round cards shown via standings module
_renderHQHomeBanded standings section handles all row counts

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Token consumption from W1.S1 verified — no raw hex/px/ms
acceptance_criteria.evidence: W1.S1 audit doc (clubhouse-design-system.md) confirms exemptions for calendar dots + share-card; feed diff colors borderline-exempt

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Predecessor fallback path works (try/catch back to _renderMobileHome)
acceptance_criteria.evidence: src/pages/home.js:89-98 — error caught, falls back, dataset stamps 'hq-fallback'

outcome: SHIPPED — implementation pre-existed in v8.11.4 + v8.15.1; this ship-progress formalizes against W1.S2 spec acceptance criteria. No code changes required beyond W1.S1 baseline tokens.
downstream_consumers: W1.S3 Members directory consumes page-shell · W1.S5 Spectator HUD consumes page-shell · W1.S6 ParCoin wagers · W1.S8 Calendar · W1.S11 Feed · W1.S12 Chat — all consume the HQ chrome.
follow_ons: Visual V1 verification: side-by-side comparison vs Parbaughs HQ Final v2.html (canonical mock — not in repo, markdown spec is contract)
Container-query expansion to all consuming pages (currently only HQ Home opts in via _hqHomeContentMaxWidth)
